question:
97.) If there is a requirement to host EC2 Instances in the AWS Cloud wherein the utilization is guaranteed to be consistent for a long period of time, which of the following would you utilize to ensure costs are minimized?

A. Reserved instances
B. On-demand intances
C. Spot instances
D. Regular instances
